safety_q1.title: 1. Does the research involve select agents or toxins?

safety_q2.title: 2. Does the research involve recombinant or synthetic nucleic acid molecules?

safety_q3.title: 3. Does the research involve human blood, body fluids, tissues, or cell lines?

safety_q4.title: 4. Does the research involve hazardous chemicals or materials?

safety_q6.title: 6. Does the research involve radiation or radioactive materials?

safety_q7.title: 7. Does the research involve field work or travel to hazardous locations?

safety_q8.title: 8. Does the research involve Dual Use Research of Concern (DURC)?
